recalls.Description: The KidKraft Farm to Table play kitchen is designed for imaginative play for children aged 3 and older. This kitchen set features a black and light gray color scheme with wood-like countertops, measuring approximately 44 inches in length, 13 ¾ inches in width, and 43 inches in height. The model number 53411 can be found on a sticker located on the back of the kitchen unit.
recalls.Title: Backyard Kids Recalls KidKraft Farm to Table Play Kitchen Due to Strangulation Risk; One Fatal Incident Reported
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further information, consumers can reach Backyard Kids at 800-882-0234 from 8:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, via email at recall@kidkraft.com, or visit www.kidkraft.com/pages/recall.

Products.Name: KidKraft Farm to Table Play Kitchen
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 192,000 (In addition, 12 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled KidKraft Farm to Table Play Kitchen
Recalled KidKraft Farm to Table Play Kitchen (the hooks are circled)

Injuries.Name: In February 2023 in Oregon, a 23-month-old child was asphyxiated after his shirt got caught on one of the hooks while climbing and crawling through the opening at the back of the play kitchen where the toy kitchen accessories are held. The child was unable to rescue himself and died from strangulation and asphyxia.

Retailers.Name: Available for purchase online at KidKraft.com, Amazon.com, and Walmart.com from 2018 until July 2025, priced between $120 and $270.

Distributors.Name: Backyard Kids, LLC, of Plano, Texas

Hazards.Name: Strangulation risk due to clothing getting caught on hooks intended for toy accessories.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the play kitchen, remove the original hooks, and request free replacement hooks from Backyard Kids.

recalls.metaDescription: Backyard Kids recalls KidKraft Farm to Table Play Kitchen due to a strangulation hazard. One death reported. Contact for free replacement hooks.
